summary: Phase 2 testing: Admin portal TOTP, email notifications, grace period logic, daily scheduler, email-only login. 37/37 backend tests pass. All 15 specified features verified via backend tests + Playwright UI. One bug fixed: /auth/me missing grace_info in subscription response.

minor.issue: subscription response was missing grace_info field — Layout.js grace period banner would not show after page refresh. FIXED in routes/auth.py by adding get_grace_info() call.

integration_issues.issue: After login(), setUser(res.data.user) sets user without subscription. subscription is only set after fetchUser() calls /auth/me (triggered by token change useEffect). During this brief window, user.subscription is undefined so Layout.js banners don't render. Functionally acceptable since fetchUser resolves quickly.

action_items: COMPLETED: /auth/me now includes grace_info in subscription response (fixed in routes/auth.py)
OPTIONAL: The admin_auth/status endpoint publicly reveals whether a super admin exists (has_super_admin=true/false) — consider removing or returning a generic response for security hardening
OPTIONAL: admin_auth/verify-setup returns HTTP 200 with verified:false for wrong codes — could use 400 for clearer REST semantics
OPTIONAL: In AuthContext.login(), consider also calling fetchUser() immediately or setting user from the login response's subscription alongside user properties
critical_code_review_comments: routes/auth.py get_me(): Missing grace_info in subscription response (FIXED). Without this fix, the grace period and expired banners in Layout.js would not show after page refresh since fetchUser() populates user from /auth/me.

routes/admin_auth.py verify_totp_setup(): Returns HTTP 200 with {verified: false} for wrong TOTP code (lines 192-193). While consistent with the frontend expectation, HTTP 400 would be more RESTful for failed verification.
routes/admin_auth.py status endpoint: Publicly reveals has_super_admin=true, which is information disclosure. An attacker scanning for admin portals would know the /admin route is active.
main.py startup: Daily subscription check at 9 AM is correctly registered. Both jobs (daily_backup, daily_subscription_check) confirmed in backend logs.
services/email_service.py: Resend API key confirmed present (re_ZzpSe5Fo_...). SENDER_EMAIL = onboarding@resend.dev (Resend test sender — production should use custom domain for deliverability).
seed_data_creation: GRACE_TEST_ORG created for grace/expired banner testing (trial reset to 14 days from now after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features all work: admin portal at /admin (TOTP setup flow with QR code), email-only login, owner email updated, grace period banners (grace=amber, expired=red), daily subscription scheduler at 9 AM. The only bug was /auth/me missing grace_info (now fixed). Admin portal TOTP is still in setup mode (totp_ready=false) — the super admin has not yet scanned the QR code and verified a TOTP code. When they do, verify-setup will enable TOTP and email backup codes. Recovery flow exists but cannot be tested until TOTP is set up (backup codes are only generated after verify-setup). Email service uses Resend with onboarding@resend.dev sender (Resend testing mode — production needs custom domain).

phase2_feature_checklist.admin_portal_separate: PASS — /admin shows Platform Administration portal (not regular login)
phase2_feature_checklist.admin_totp_verify_setup: PASS — wrong code returns verified:false error message
phase2_feature_checklist.admin_recovery_flow: PASS — recovery link exists in TOTP step, invalid code shows error
phase2_feature_checklist.email_only_login: PASS — /login shows Email Address (type=email), no Username field
phase2_feature_checklist.plans_endpoint: PASS — GET /api/organizations/plans returns plans + trial_days=14 + extra_branch pricing
phase2_feature_checklist.auth_me_grace_info: FIXED — /auth/me now returns grace_info in subscription response
phase2_feature_checklist.grace_period_banner: PASS — Red banner shows 'Your account locks TODAY. Renew your subscription to keep access.'
phase2_feature_checklist.expired_lock_banner: PASS — Red banner shows 'Your subscription has expired. Access to most features is locked.'
phase2_feature_checklist.email_service_send_welcome: PASS — send_welcome function exists, uses Resend API with configured key
phase2_feature_checklist.daily_scheduler: PASS — daily_subscription_check at 9 AM confirmed in code + logs
phase2_feature_checklist.admin_portal_not_linked: PASS — No /admin links on landing page or /login page
